nasb.text: Behold, since its blood had not been brought inside, into the sanctuary, you should certainly have eaten it in the sanctuary, just as I commanded.”

esv.text: Behold, its blood was not brought into the inner part of the sanctuary. You certainly ought to have eaten it in the sanctuary, as I commanded.”

cnv.text: 這祭牲的血既然沒有帶進聖所裡去，你們就應該照著我所吩咐的，在聖所裡吃這祭肉。”

ccb.text: 既然这祭牲的血没有被带进圣所，你们本应按照我的吩咐在圣洁之处吃这祭肉。”
